results.title: Canadiens thrash well-rested ’Canes
results.description: RALEIGH, N.C. -- The Montreal Canadiens never flinched in winning two Game 7s on the road to reach the Eastern Conference final. Opening on the road again was no different, even against a well-rested top seed that had yet to lose in the postseason.

results.title: 2-time NASCAR champion Kyle Busch has died at 41, NASCAR says
results.description: 2-time NASCAR champion Kyle Busch hospitalized with severe illness, family says

results.title: Medieval hospital becomes youth space in £8.5m plan
results.description: National Lottery funding will help the Marlowe Theatre to renovate the Poor Priests' Hospital.

results.title: Elk Grove captures 12th section championship with win over Rodriguez
results.description: SACRAMENTO, Calif. (KTXL) - Elk Grove baseball is bringing another section banner home. The Thundering Herd held off Rodriguez 5-4 Thursday night at Sacramento City College to win the CIF Sac-Joaquin Section Division II championship, adding to the program’s rich history with its 12th section title. Elk Grove entered the postseason as one of the [...]

results.title: Berlin OKs bid to rehost Olympics
results.description: Berlin’s state parliament has given the go-ahead for the city’s bid to rehost the Olympic Games on or after the 100th anniversary of the 1936 Games staged by the Nazis. “Our bid is a genuine promise for future generations,” Berlin Mayor Kai Wegner said during the 90-minute debate that preceded the vote Thursday. “We want ... The post Berlin OKs bid to rehost Olympics appeared first on Ghanaian Times .

results.title: British Climber Summits Everest for Record 20th Time, 2 Die on Mountain
results.description: A Briton improved his own Everest record on Friday and notched his 20th ascent to the world’s highest peak, as two Indian climbers died on the mountain, taking the season's toll to five, hiking officials said. Kenton Cool, 52, climbed the 8,849-meter (29,032-foot) peak before dawn and was descending to lower camps. He was expected to reach the base camp over the weekend, his expedition organizers said, according to Reuters.

results.title: Howard Fendrich, award-winning AP national sports writer and tennis expert, dies at 55
results.description: Howard Fendrich, a longtime national sports writer for The Associated Press, has died at 55
